title: Locked Out 被锁门外
scene: Sara放学回家发现门被锁了，进不去家。

lines.en: Oh no! The door is locked. Mom is not home yet.
lines.zh: 噢不！门锁了。妈妈还没回来。

lines.en: Sara, are you OK? Do you need help?
Yes, Mrs. Wang. I am locked out of my house.
lines.zh: 是的，王阿姨。我被锁在门外了。

lines.en: Do you have a key in your bag?
Let me check. No, I must have left it inside.
lines.zh: 让我找找。没有，一定是忘在屋里了。

lines.en: Do you know your mom's phone number?
lines.zh: 你知道你妈妈的电话号码吗？

lines.en: Yes, I do. Can I use your phone?
lines.zh: 知道。我可以用你的手机吗？

lines.en: Of course. Come inside my house and make the call.
lines.zh: 当然可以。来我家里打电话吧。

lines.en: Thank you so much, Mrs. Wang. Mom said she will be back in ten minutes.
lines.zh: 太感谢了，王阿姨。妈妈说她十分钟后回来。

lines.en: You can wait here. Would you like some juice?
lines.zh: 你可以在这里等。要喝果汁吗？
